subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 05/25] server41tests: pass_warn() when server doesn't support dir delegations

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch modifies the server41tests to pass a warning instead of failing when the server doesn't support directory delegations or doesn't hand out a delegation. It also adds checks for correct notification handling and passes a warning if the server doesn't offer the necessary notifications. This change makes it safe to keep the directory delegation tests in the 'all' group.
